changes.body: REWORK: Gains a Boosted Attack at set interval (5s) dealing increased damage and throwing enemies in the air for .5s.

changes.heading: Guard Swap -> replaced by Power Swap
changes.body:
Creates a link between the user and the Pokémon this move hits. While the link holds, the user's movement speed increases and its hp is continually restored. The link will continue to hold for as long as the linked Pokémon stay in range or until another target is Power Swapped. If the linked Pokémon is an ally Pokémon, this move increases the movement speed of that Pokémon, increases the amount of damage it deals, and continually restores that Pokémon's HP. If the linked Pokémon is an enemy Pokémon, this move decreases the movement speed of that Pokémon, decreases the amount of damage it deals and deals damage over time to that Pokémon. Damage and healing ticks at a rate of 0.5s

+ Damage: 20% + 2 x (Level - 1) + 50
+ Healing: 20% + 2 x (Level - 1) + 50
+ Damage boost (Ally): 15%
+ Damage debuff (Enemy): 15%
+ Speed buff (Ally and self): 15%
+ Slow (Enemy): 15%

+ Upgrade: Further increases the amount of damage dealt by ally Pokémon and further decreases the amount of damage dealt by opposing Pokémon
+ Damage boost (Ally): 20%
+ Damage debuff (Enemy): 20%

changes.body:
NOTES: Now lasts as long as your target is in range, breaks after target moves too far away or the move is used again on another target.
NOTES: Damage and healing triggers every half second instead of every second.
NOTES: There was no formula change here, just the tick rates :)

changes.heading: Stats:
changes.body:
SIDEBAR: Okay, the JP patch notes called this a buff. I'd like to spend a brief section discussing these numbers. These Special numbers... are nigh *exactly* the same as Gardevoir's. They are literally identical except A9 has one more SpA at all times. It seems like this might have been a mistake, or perhaps it was intentional to line their stats. This does mean A9 will do less damage until Level 10. Very odd "buff" overall.

Old SpA: 51/71/94/211/242/277/317/363/416/477/548/629/723/831/955
New SpA: 51/65/81/101/125/201/235/276/325/479/549/633/734/856/1002
